chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1363 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 11.10.2023 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Asif Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statements have been filed on behalf of respondents No.2 to 5 & 7, which are taken on record. Respondent No.7 (Investigating Officer of Crime No.189 of 2023 registered at Police Station Ratodero, District Larkana under Sections 356-B, 452, 363 PPC) is present, files a copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Fazeela (Petitioner No.1) recorded under Section 161 CrPC, and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Ali Murad (Petitioner No.2) with her own accord and freewill and is living happily with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She has further stated that her brother (Respondent No.11) has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. Investigating Officer further states that he will file a copy of such statement along with his report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR in accordance with law. Both the petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed.

Both the petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
